response.text:
REJECT

rationale: My SoC is critically low (43.1%, islanded) and I'm in distress mode; I must preserve the 0.5 kWh to maintain my own essential load and cannot share outbound despite r2c5's normal-urgency request.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r3c5 is now in distress (SoC 43.1%, islanded, 1 kW load). Shift from donor to receiver mode. Minimize outbound sharing to preserve critical reserve. Broadcast urgent requests to all geographic neighbors (r2c5, r3c4, r4c5) for inbound support. Previous rejections from neighbors suggest cluster-wide stress; expect limited inbound aid but must attempt..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
